metadata.description: Base name for all resources (e.g. pseudoai-prod). Must be globally unique for the Web App.
Azure region for all resources. Defaults to the resource group location.
App Service Plan pricing tier. B1 is the smallest Linux tier that supports multi-container.
Container image tag to deploy. Use "latest" or a specific "sha-<shortsha>" tag.
Deploy Application Insights and Log Analytics workspace for monitoring.
SumUp secret API key (server-side only). Leave empty to configure later.
SumUp merchant code. Leave empty to configure later.
Initial admin password for PseudoAI. Change after first login.
OpenAI API key for AI integration (optional). Leave empty to disable.

variables.dockerComposeContent:
[format('version: "3.8"
services:
  web:
    image: {0}/web:{1}
    ports:
      - "80:80"
    depends_on:
      - api
      - nlp
    restart: unless-stopped
  api:
    image: {2}/api-php:{3}
    expose:
      - "8081"
    restart: unless-stopped
  nlp:
    image: {4}/nlp-python:{5}
    expose:
      - "5000"
    restart: unless-stopped
', variables('imageBase'), parameters('imageTag'), variables('imageBase'), parameters('imageTag'), variables('imageBase'), parameters('imageTag'))]

siteConfig.appSettings: [flatten(createArray(createArray(createObject('name', 'WEBSITES_PORT', 'value', '80'), createObject('name', 'WEBSITES_ENABLE_APP_SERVICE_STORAGE', 'value', 'false'), createObject('name', 'APP_MODE', 'value', 'single'), createObject('name', 'IMAGE_TAG', 'value', parameters('imageTag')), createObject('name', 'SUMUP_API_KEY', 'value', parameters('sumupApiKey')), createObject('name', 'SUMUP_MERCHANT_CODE', 'value', parameters('sumupMerchantCode')), createObject('name', 'SUMUP_API_BASE_URL', 'value', 'https://api.sumup.com/v0.1'), createObject('name', 'FRONTEND_BASE_URL', 'value', format('https://{0}.azurewebsites.net', parameters('appName'))), createObject('name', 'CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS', 'value', format('https://{0}.azurewebsites.net', parameters('appName'))), createObject('name', 'NLP_PYTHON_ENABLED', 'value', 'true'), createObject('name', 'NLP_PYTHON_URL', 'value', 'http://nlp:5000'), createObject('name', 'NLP_PYTHON_DEADLINE_SECONDS', 'value', '35'), createObject('name', 'NLP_PYTHON_NER_ENABLED', 'value', 'false'), createObject('name', 'NLP_PII_HINTS_ENABLED', 'value', 'false'), createObject('name', 'MASK_SINGLE_NAMES_DEFAULT', 'value', 'false'), createObject('name', 'AUTO_CREATE_INITIAL_USER', 'value', 'true'), createObject('name', 'INITIAL_USER_USERNAME', 'value', 'user'), createObject('name', 'INITIAL_USER_PASSWORD', 'value', parameters('initialUserPassword')), createObject('name', 'INITIAL_USER_EMAIL', 'value', ''), createObject('name', 'OPENAI_API_KEY', 'value', parameters('openaiApiKey')), createObject('name', 'AI_MODEL_DEFAULT', 'value', 'gpt-4o-mini'), createObject('name', 'AI_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS_CAP', 'value', '2048'), createObject('name', 'AI_MAX_INPUT_CHARS_CAP', 'value', '40000')), if(parameters('enableAppInsights'), createArray(createObject('name', 'APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING', 'value', coalesce(tryGet(if(parameters('enableAppInsights'), reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Insights/components', variables('insightsName')), '2020-02-02', 'full'), null()), 'properties', 'ConnectionString'), ''))), createArray())))]

metadata.description: The public URL of the deployed PseudoAI application.
Resource ID of the Web App.
